creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #12)

If you are still at some 10.x based build . . .

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=229543

is about a problem going from a 10.1 based stable/10
vintage to a 11.2 based stable/11 vintage via a source based
build.

Its comment #3 from Brooks Davis says:

QUOTE
This isn't a supported configuration.  You'll need to upgrade to 10.4 to get a wide range of compiler and c++ runtime fixed.
END QUOTE
